const experiences = [
  {
    id: 1,
    role: "Web Analytics Trainee",
    company: "ELK Education Consultants Pvt Ltd.",
    duration: "Oct 2025 – Present",
    type: "Full-time Trainee",
    location: "India",
    points: [
      "Contributed to real-world web development projects, improving application performance by 25% through UI optimization and code refactoring.",
      "Reduced page load time by 30% by optimizing components, minimizing re-renders, and compressing static assets.",
      "Assisted in API integration and backend data handling, improving system reliability by 18%.",
      "Collaborated in Agile sprint cycles, reducing bug resolution turnaround time by 15%.",
      "Enhanced website usability and responsiveness, increasing user engagement by 20%.",
      "Analyzed traffic patterns and user behavior using industry-standard analytics tools, uncovering actionable insights that guided data-driven improvements for multiple client websites.",
    ],
    stats: [
      { value: "25%", label: "Performance Boost" },
      { value: "30%", label: "Load Time Reduced" },
      { value: "20%", label: "User Engagement" },
    ],
    tags: ["React", "Web Analytics", "API Integration", "Agile", "UI Optimization"],
  },
];

export default experiences;
